title: AI Student Pack Vol. 1 — Hedra + HeyGen discounts
html:
"AI Student Pack Vol. 1" promo — 50% off Hedra annual Pro / two months Creator (worth $30 or $450) and 50% off HeyGen Creator ($170). Likely sourced for Brotein marketing video assets.

hedra · heygen · ai video tooling · brotein · ai student pack
